name: In-the-Wild Multimodal Affective Sensing Dataset (D1–D3)
description: A three-wave longitudinal in-the-wild smartphone and wearable sensing dataset for moment-level affective state modeling. Collected annually from 2020 to 2022, the dataset pairs passive sensor data from participants' own Android smartphones and Fitbit wearables with dense in-situ self-reported affective labels collected via Experience Sampling Method (ESM). Three waves (D1, D2, D3) share a core label space of valence, arousal, stress, and task disturbance. D3 additionally includes PANAS-style affective word intensity labels. Hosted on Harvard Dataverse with gated access (CC BY-NC 4.0); users must agree to the Data Use Agreement before downloading. Preprocessing follows the reproducible pipeline of Zhang et al. (2024), DOI: 10.1145/3678578.
measurementTechnique: Experience Sampling Method (ESM); passive smartphone sensing; Fitbit wearable sensing
rai:dataCollection: Participants were university students recruited via campus bulletin boards. They installed a custom Android application that collected passive sensor data and delivered ESM prompts during waking hours (10 AM–10 PM). Wearables (Fitbit Inspire HR; Polar H10 for D1/D2 subsets) were worn throughout the collection period. All procedures were approved by the IRB at [TODO: institution], approval number [TODO: IRB number]. Dataset hosted on Harvard Dataverse (https://dataverse.harvard.edu/TODO) under CC BY-NC 4.0 with gated access.
rai:dataCollectionType: Active (ESM self-report) and passive (smartphone/wearable sensor streams)
rai:dataPreprocessingProtocol: Preprocessing follows the reproducible 8-stage mobile sensing pipeline of Zhang et al. (2024), DOI: 10.1145/3678578. Stages include: ESM QC (expired prompt removal, minimum response thresholds), feature extraction across current/15-min/epoch/daily time windows, feature normalization, LASSO-based feature selection, and LOSO cross-validation. Additional anonymization: GPS longitude offset by per-participant constant, contact numbers MD5-hashed, Bluetooth/Wi-Fi MAC addresses UUID-replaced.
rai:annotationsPerItem: Each ESM instance has 4 shared labels (D1, D2, D3) or 12 labels (D3 only). Labels are self-reported by the participant at the time of the ESM prompt.
rai:personalSensitiveInformation: Dataset contains passively sensed behavioral data (location, app usage, communication metadata) from real individuals, collected under IRB approval and written informed consent. Anonymization applied; see DATASHEET.md Section 2.

distribution.name: D1 dataset archive
distribution.description: Complete data archive for wave D1 (Feb–Apr 2020, 92 participants after QC). Requires Harvard Dataverse account and agreement to Data Use Agreement before download.

distribution.name: D2 dataset archive
distribution.description: Complete data archive for wave D2 (Dec 2020–Jan 2021, 99 participants after QC). Requires Harvard Dataverse account and agreement to Data Use Agreement before download.

distribution.name: D3 dataset archive
distribution.description: Complete data archive for wave D3 (Nov 2021–Jan 2022, 106 participants after QC). Requires Harvard Dataverse account and agreement to Data Use Agreement before download.

recordSet.name: ESM Responses
recordSet.description: In-situ self-reported affective state labels, one row per ESM response per participant. Available for all three waves.

field.name: Pcode
field.description: Anonymized participant identifier

field.name: TriggerTime
field.description: Unix timestamp (milliseconds, UTC) when the ESM prompt was delivered

field.name: ResponseTime
field.description: Unix timestamp (milliseconds, UTC) when the participant submitted the response

field.name: Valence
field.description: Self-reported valence on a 7-point scale (−3=very negative to +3=very positive). Available in D1, D2, D3.

field.name: Arousal
field.description: Self-reported arousal on a 7-point scale (−3=very calm to +3=very activated). Available in D1, D2, D3.

field.name: Stress
field.description: Self-reported stress. Scale −3 to +3 in D1 and D2; scale 0 to +6 in D3.

field.name: Disturbance
field.description: Self-reported task disturbance. Scale −3 to +3 in D1 and D2; scale 0 to +6 in D3.

field.name: Happy
field.description: PANAS-style affect word: Happy. D3 only, scale 0 to +6.

field.name: Relaxed
field.description: PANAS-style affect word: Relaxed. D3 only, scale 0 to +6.

field.name: Cheerful
field.description: PANAS-style affect word: Cheerful. D3 only, scale 0 to +6.

field.name: Content
field.description: PANAS-style affect word: Content. D3 only, scale 0 to +6.

field.name: Sad
field.description: PANAS-style affect word: Sad. D3 only, scale 0 to +6.

field.name: Anxious
field.description: PANAS-style affect word: Anxious. D3 only, scale 0 to +6.

field.name: Depressed
field.description: PANAS-style affect word: Depressed. D3 only, scale 0 to +6.

field.name: Angry
field.description: PANAS-style affect word: Angry. D3 only, scale 0 to +6.

recordSet.name: User Information
recordSet.description: Participant-level demographic and psychological trait measures, collected once per wave.

field.name: Pcode
field.description: Anonymized participant identifier

field.name: Age
field.description: Participant age in years

field.name: Gender
field.description: Participant gender (M/F)

field.name: BFI
field.description: Big Five Inventory short form (K-BFI-15): Openness, Conscientiousness, Extraversion, Agreeableness, Neuroticism

field.name: PSS
field.description: Perceived Stress Scale (PSS-10) total score

field.name: GHQ
field.description: General Health Questionnaire (GHQ-12) total score

field.name: PHQ
field.description: Patient Health Questionnaire (PHQ-9) depression score. Available in D1 and D2 only.

recordSet.name: Fitbit Heart Rate
recordSet.description: Continuous wrist-based heart rate from Fitbit Inspire HR, sampled at 1 Hz. Available for all three waves.

field.name: Pcode
field.description: Anonymized participant identifier

field.name: timestamp
field.description: Unix timestamp (milliseconds, UTC)

field.name: value
field.description: Heart rate in beats per minute (BPM)
